name: Wildcard cert lab.local - this should be red 1dateTrigger mail
description: Certificate has expired. Renew via internal CA and rebind in IIS. See KB-1101.

mail.mailBody: The certificate for web-prod-01.lab.local is approaching its expiry date.

teams.teamBody: The certificate for web-prod-01.lab.local is approaching its expiry date.

name: SQL Server AG cert - this should be orange yellow 2dateTrigger mail
description: Expired. Availability group encryption is running on a stale cert. Escalate to DBA on-call.

teams.teamSubject: SQL Server AG cert expires soon
teams.teamBody: The certificate for sql-prod-02.lab.local is approaching its expiry date.
